title: with + O + V-ing / p.p.（with 獨立分詞構句）

formulas.zh: 介系詞 with 引導獨立分詞構句，O 與 V-ing 為主動關係，表伴隨狀態或方式
介系詞 with 引導獨立分詞構句，O 與 p.p. 為被動關係，表伴隨狀態或方式

explanation: with 引導的獨立分詞構句用來補充說明主句，通常表伴隨狀態、方式或條件。當分詞與 with 後的受詞構成主動關係時用 V-ing，構成被動關係時用過去分詞 p.p.。此結構常見於描寫人物、情景或動作方式，使句子更生動具體。與 with + O + adj/n 不同，此句型強調動作過程而非靜態狀態，需注意分詞與受詞的邏輯主語關係。

examples.eng: With the rain falling heavily, the students decided to stay indoors.
examples.chi: 由於雨勢下得很大，學生們決定待在室內。

examples.eng: With all the homework finished, she felt relieved and happy.
examples.chi: 功課全部完成了，她感到輕鬆快樂。

examples.eng: With his hands trembling slightly, the speaker delivered the important announcement.
examples.chi: 演講者雙手微微顫抖著，宣布了這則重要訊息。

examples.eng: With the project completed ahead of schedule, the team celebrated their success.
examples.chi: 專案提前完成了，團隊慶祝他們的成功。

extension.tip: 判斷分詞形式的關鍵：觀察 with 後的受詞與分詞的邏輯關係。若受詞主動執行動作用 V-ing；若受詞被動接受動作用 p.p.。注意不能用「with + O + to V」結構，也不能混淆 with 分詞構句與 with + O + adj/n 的靜態描寫。

examples.test: With the window ______ (open), fresh air filled the room.
With the door ______ (lock), nobody could enter the building.
With children ______ (play) in the garden, mothers watched carefully.

extension.note: 受詞是主角，分詞是動作；主動則用 V-ing，被動則用 p.p.。

parts: over the mountains, the landscape looked breathtaking.
exercises.sentence: With the sunset spreading over the mountains, the landscape looked breathtaking.
exercises.translation: 隨著夕陽在山上蔓延開來，景色看起來令人歎為觀止。

parts: , everyone left the conference room satisfied.
exercises.sentence: With the meeting concluded, everyone left the conference room satisfied.
exercises.translation: 會議結束了，每個人都滿意地離開了會議室。

parts: with tears, she told us the sad news.
exercises.sentence: With her eyes filled with tears, she told us the sad news.
exercises.translation: 她眼裡充滿淚水，向我們訴說了這個傷心的消息。

parts: softly outside, we sat by the fireplace and read.
exercises.sentence: With the snow falling softly outside, we sat by the fireplace and read.
exercises.translation: 外面雪花輕輕飄落，我們坐在壁爐旁閱讀。
